title: Vijayalaya Cholesvaram
tagline: Vijayalaya Cholesvaram — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vijayalaya Choleeswaram in Narthamalai, a panchayat town in Pudukottai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, India, is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva, Vishnu
overview.description: Vijayalaya Choleeswaram in Narthamalai, a panchayat town in Pudukottai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, India, is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva, Vishnu and houses the 8th century Jaina Abode. The temple is considered one of the oldest stone temples in South India. The other portions of Narthamalai houses the 8th century Jaina Abode, the Aluruttimalai Jain Caves. The Temple is Constructed in the Dravida style and rock cut architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the 9th century by Mutharaiyar dynasty kings, the feudatories of the Pallavas, with

topPlaces.description: Illuppur taluk is a taluk of Pudukkottai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Its headquarters is the town of Iluppur.

topPlaces.name: Thirukattupalli
topPlaces.description: Thirukattupalli (Ancient name: Melaithirukattupalli) is a panchayat town near Thiruvaiyaru in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The economy of this town is based on the agricultural lands of the surrounding villages.

topPlaces.name: Thennambadi
topPlaces.description: Thennambadi, or Thennambady is a small village in Tamil Nadu, India located 6 km From Viralimalai. Thennambadi is one of the village in Viralimalai Taluk in Pudukkottai District in Tamil Nadu State.

topPlaces.name: Vellanjar
topPlaces.description: Vellanjar is a village in the Annavasal revenue block of Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kodumbalur
topPlaces.description: Kodumbalur is a village in Pudukkottai district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the site of the Moovar Koil temple complex.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vijayalaya Cholesvaram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vijayalaya Cholesvaram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vijayalaya Cholesvaram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (30 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vijayalaya Cholesvaram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vijayalaya Cholesvaram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vijayalaya Cholesvaram?
faq.a: Stays in Vijayalaya Cholesvaram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vijayalaya Cholesvaram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ennai, Alathur, Pudukkottai, Iluppur, Illuppur taluk, Thirukattupalli.
